settings.hero_title: Configure AI models, prompts and PDF extraction
settings.hero_text: Model settings auto-save. Prompt changes require a manual save. They are independent of each other.
settings.version.title: Version
settings.version.desc: Check whether a newer version is available.
settings.desktop_close.title: Close Behavior
settings.desktop_close.desc: Desktop only. Decide whether closing the window should ask every time, minimize to the tray, or exit directly.
settings.desktop_close.status_hint: Changes take effect immediately and also control the "Remember this choice" option in the close prompt.
settings.desktop_close.effect_ask: The app will ask every time before closing the window.
settings.desktop_close.effect_minimize: Closing the window will minimize CiteBox to the tray without asking again.
settings.desktop_close.effect_exit: Closing the window will exit CiteBox directly without asking again.
settings.ai.model_desc: Add or edit AI models. Changes are auto-saved.
settings.ai.scene_desc: Assign default models for reading and organization scenes, and adjust general settings. Changes are auto-saved.
settings.ai.translate_desc: Set the language and model for text selection translation. Changes are auto-saved.
settings.ai.prompt_desc: Edit prompts for each scene and reusable role prompts. Click Save after making changes.
settings.ai.role_prompt_desc: Reusable role presets. After saving, use @RoleName in the AI Reader chat to invoke them.
settings.ai.role_prompt_empty: No role prompts saved yet. Create one and use @RoleName in the AI Reader chat to invoke it.
settings.ai.prompt_modified: Prompts modified. Click "Save Prompt Config" to apply.
settings.ai.restore_done: Default prompts restored. Click "Save Prompt Config" to apply.
settings.ai.restore_done_toast: Default prompts restored. Remember to save.
settings.ai.system_prompt_help: A global role prompt applied to all AI conversations. No need to repeat specific tasks or output formats here.
settings.ai.system_prompt_placeholder: Global role setting, e.g. prioritize citing evidence; state uncertainty when evidence is insufficient
settings.ai.system_prompt_note: This is sent as systemPrompt separately and will not be included in the userPrompt template below.
settings.ai.qa_prompt_help: For single-paper Q&A in the AI Reader. Full text, abstract, notes, figure summaries and chat history are attached automatically.
settings.ai.qa_prompt_placeholder: Supplementary requirements for paper Q&A, e.g. prioritize conclusions, evidence chains and limitations
settings.ai.figure_prompt_help: For the currently viewed figure only. Write your interpretation focus and criteria here; figure info, full text and output format are attached automatically.
settings.ai.figure_prompt_placeholder: Main task for current figure, e.g. prioritize design, controls, conclusions and limitations
settings.ai.tag_prompt_help: For the currently viewed figure only, generating figure tags. Write tag selection criteria and preferences here; figure info, existing tag library and JSON output format are attached automatically.
settings.ai.tag_prompt_placeholder: Main task for current figure tags, e.g. prefer searchable content tags, avoid overly generic terms
settings.ai.group_prompt_help: For whole-paper group assignment. Current group, group library, abstract, notes and full text are attached automatically.
settings.ai.group_prompt_placeholder: Supplementary requirements for group assignment, e.g. prefer reusing existing groups before suggesting new ones
settings.ai.translate_prompt_help: For desktop text selection translation. The system auto-detects translation direction and provides source text and target language.
settings.ai.translate_prompt_placeholder: e.g. return only the translated text, preserve line breaks, terms, abbreviations and units
settings.ai.base_url_placeholder: Uses official endpoint by default; enter custom URL for compatible gateways
settings.ai.legacy_mode: Use legacy OpenAI mode (Chat Completions) for compatibility with other OpenAI-style gateways
settings.ai.model_editor_saving: Current model changes will be auto-saved.
settings.ai.model_keep_one: At least one AI model must be kept
settings.ai.no_models: No models yet. Add one to get started.
settings.ai.provider_note_openai: OpenAI uses Responses API by default. Enable legacy mode to switch to Chat Completions for compatible gateways.
settings.ai.provider_note_anthropic: Anthropic uses the native Messages API. Enter a compatible Base URL and model name.
settings.ai.provider_note_gemini: Gemini uses the generateContent endpoint. API Key is sent via query parameter.
settings.ai.role_overwrite_confirm: A role named "{0}" already exists. Overwrite?
settings.ai.role_editor_desc: A role prompt stores role info only. After saving, type @RoleName in the AI Reader chat to invoke it.
settings.ai.role_editor_prompt_placehold: e.g. You are a strict paper reviewer focusing on evidence chains, method gaps and conclusion boundaries.
settings.extractor.title: PDF Extraction
settings.extractor.desc: Choose extraction profile. Switch between manual, built-in LLM coordinate extraction, or standard pdffigx.
settings.extractor.pdffigx_hint: For standard pdffigx, just enter the service root URL like `http://127.0.0.1:8000`. The system will auto-append `/api/v1/extract` and `/api/v1/jobs`.
settings.extractor.manual_hint: Manual mode: no automatic figure extraction. Full text is saved on upload from both web and WeChat. You can add figures manually later.
settings.extractor.builtin_hint: Built-in LLM extraction does not require pdffigx URL, auth or poll settings. Figure coordinates are detected by the selected multimodal model; full text defaults to browser pdf.js with server fallback.
settings.weixin.title: WeChat
settings.weixin.desc: Configure WeChat message bridge, binding status, and the model used for IM intent recognition.
settings.weixin.overview_heading: Receive messages, upload references and trigger extraction via WeChat
settings.weixin.overview_text: When bridging is on, you can upload PDFs, ask questions or run commands directly from WeChat. IM intent model changes are auto-saved.
settings.weixin.bridge_desc: Control whether to receive and reply to WeChat messages. Changes take effect after saving.
settings.weixin.bridge_checkbox:
Enable WeChat notifications
When on, messages are received and replied via WeChat; when off, no messages are sent or received.
settings.weixin.bridge_modified: Modified. Click "Save WeChat Bridge Config" to apply.
settings.weixin.binding_desc: Scan QR code to bind. Once bound, upload references and send messages directly from WeChat.
settings.weixin.binding_status_hint: Click "Start Binding" to generate a QR code.
settings.weixin.qr_placeholder_text: Click "Start Binding" to show a QR code. You can also use it to rebind when already bound.
settings.weixin.qr_scan_hint: Scan with WeChat. Re-generate if expired.
settings.weixin.qr_session_empty: QR session is empty, cannot track binding status
settings.weixin.unbind_confirm: Unbind WeChat? You will stop receiving WeChat messages.
settings.weixin.binding_scanned: QR scanned, please confirm in WeChat
settings.weixin.detail_not_bound: No WeChat account bound. Save bridge settings first, then scan QR code to bind.
settings.weixin.detail_ready: Bridge and binding are ready. Upload PDFs, send messages and trigger extraction via WeChat.
settings.weixin.detail_no_binding: Bridge is on but no account is bound. Generate a QR code and scan to start.
settings.weixin.detail_bridge_off: Account is bound but bridge is off. No messages will be sent or received.
settings.wolai.title: Wolai
settings.wolai.desc: Configure Wolai authorization and target page to sync notes.
settings.wolai.token_placeholder: Paste a token that can call OpenAPI directly
settings.wolai.parent_block_placeholder: Notes will be saved as sub-pages under this page
settings.wolai.usage_hint: "Test Token" verifies access. "Insert Test Page" creates a Test Page with content and an image export TODO note. "Save to Wolai" saves the current draft as a new block page without replacing local saves, but images are currently written as TODO placeholders.
settings.wolai.testing_status: Verifying Wolai token and target block access...
settings.wolai.inserting_status: Creating Wolai test page with image export TODO...
settings.password.change_desc: Change the admin account login password
settings.password.empty_fields: Please fill in all password fields
settings.password.too_short: New password must be at least 6 characters
settings.password.changed_toast: Password changed. Please sign in with the new password.
settings.db.title: Database
settings.db.desc: Export, import or purge the database. Import will overwrite existing data.
settings.db.export_desc: Download a full backup of the current database
settings.db.import_desc: Restore from a backup file, overwriting existing data
settings.db.import_no_file: Please select a database file to import
settings.db.import_confirm_message: Importing will overwrite all references, figures, groups and tags with the backup file. This starts immediately after confirmation.
settings.db.purge_desc: Delete all references, figures, groups and tags. This cannot be undone.
settings.db.purge_confirm_message: This will delete all references, extracted figures, groups and tags permanently. Only use this when you want to reset the entire library.
